Video.summary: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!
Video.title: Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 1

Image.alt: Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 1
Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 1
Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 1

Video.summary: Angela shows how to create a dress out of a simple t-shirt.
Video.title: It's Sew Easy: T-Shirt Dress

Image.alt: It's Sew Easy: T-Shirt Dress
It's Sew Easy: T-Shirt Dress

Video.summary: Hungry?! Let's make some edible food you can enjoy together with your dolls!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: Miniature Edible Food Crafts for Playtime

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: Miniature Edible Food Crafts for Playtime
My Froggy Stuff: Miniature Edible Food Crafts for Playtime

Video.summary: Angela Wolf adds pockets to the sleeve of a jacket.
Video.title: It's Sew Easy: Adding Pockets to a Jacket Sleeve

Image.alt: It's Sew Easy: Adding Pockets to a Jacket Sleeve
It's Sew Easy: Adding Pockets to a Jacket Sleeve

Video.summary: I went to the DollarTree in search of stuff to craft with… to make… well… whatever we want! From a felt wig to a box room closet, we’re getting crafty and having fun!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: Dollar Store Crafts - Toya Making Stuff - Hacks - Closet - Felt Wig

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: Dollar Store Crafts - Toya Making Stuff - Hacks - Closet - Felt Wig
My Froggy Stuff: Dollar Store Crafts - Toya Making Stuff - Hacks - Closet - Felt Wig

Video.summary: It's MerMay!!! And you know what that means! Check out this Fabsome Mermaid Doll Room! From a Fabulous See Through Water wall to Books and Nooks we've got you covered! Happy Crafting!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Mermaid Doll Room - Happy MerMay Doll!

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Mermaid Doll Room - Happy MerMay Doll!
My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Mermaid Doll Room - Happy MerMay Doll!

Video.summary: Learn how to make patchwork pillows and chair cushions with Beth!
Video.title: Quilting with Beth: Quilting Chair Cushions

Image.alt: Quilting with Beth: Quilting Chair Cushions

Video.summary: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!

Video.summary: Save those paper rolls!! Today at MyFroggyStuff - craft along with Froggy as she makes 5 EASY DollCrafts with recycled paper Rolls! ... From Hanging Gardens to Storage Spaces we've got you covered!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make 5 EASY Paper Roll Crafts - Hanging Garden Storage and More

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make 5 EASY Paper Roll Crafts - Hanging Garden Storage and More
My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make 5 EASY Paper Roll Crafts - Hanging Garden Storage and More

Video.summary: Explore the Art of Canvas Painting with nationally acclaimed artist Amit Dutt, winner of the Indian National Academy Award, Bombay Art Society All India Award and many other prestige awards for his unique canvases. Go on a journey with the renowned Indian painter and watch the art happen.
Video.title: Exploring Indian Crafts: The Art of Indian Canvas Painting

Image.alt: Exploring Indian Crafts: The Art of Indian Canvas Painting
Exploring Indian Crafts: The Art of Indian Canvas Painting

Video.summary: Gifted Madhubani artist teaches how to create a simple DIY over Madhubani Art.
Video.title: Exploring Indian Crafts: Madhubani Art

Image.alt: Exploring Indian Crafts: Madhubani Art
Exploring Indian Crafts: Madhubani Art

Video.summary: Today on Mash Ups we've got everything you need to make your Dolls a Fabulous Arcade! From a Doll Bowling Alley to a Working Arcade Game, we've got you covered! Happy Crafting!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: Doll Arcade Bowling Alley Mash Ups - Photo Booth - Claw Machine - Working Arcade Game

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: Doll Arcade Bowling Alley Mash Ups - Photo Booth - Claw Machine - Working Arcade Game
My Froggy Stuff: Doll Arcade Bowling Alley Mash Ups - Photo Booth - Claw Machine - Working Arcade Game

Video.summary: BTS ARMY FOREVER !! Thats right now you can craft this Fabsome BTS Bedroom for your Dolls today!! Watch as Froggy makes custom Bedding, Posters, and even a BTS Sweatshirt!

Video.summary: Tour beautiful artworks and learn about artists throughout history in this special series brought to you by Zhenya Gershman.
Video.title: Invisible Museum Tours: Vincent van Gogh - The Irises

Image.alt: Invisible Museum Tours: Vincent van Gogh - The Irises

Video.summary: Stay on schedule with this Fabulous Doll Calendar & Planner! This cute and EASY Doll Craft is the perfect accessory for any Dollhouse!

Video.summary: It's COLD, time to make a fabulous new DIY Coat!... This is a sewing craft and we will upload a free pattern along with this Fabsome vid! Get your dolls ready for the cold with this DIY Coat and Happy Crafting!

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make Miniature Faux Suede Coat

Video.summary: Today on Mash Ups we've got everything your Dolls need for their favorite Latte!! From a Doll Coffee Shop to a Unicorn Frappuccino we've got you covered! Happy Crafting!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: Doll Coffee Crafts Mash Ups - Coffee Shop - Coffee Dispenser - Doll Latte Frappuccino

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: Doll Coffee Crafts Mash Ups - Coffee Shop - Coffee Dispenser - Doll Latte Frappuccino

Video.summary: Let's make our Dolls this Fabulous Star Wars inspired Doll room! From bedding to a CUSTOM Plushie Porg we've got you covered!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Star Wars Doll Room PLUS Custom Plushie Porg
